question: Which of the following numbers does not have factors that include the smallest factor (other than 1) of 91?

solution.strategy: Begin by listing the factors of 91: 1, 7, 13, and 91. The smallest factor (other than 1) is 7. Of the options (21, 28, 35, 44), only 44 is not divisible by 7.
steps: List the factors of 91: 1, 7, 13, and 91.
Identify the smallest factor (other than 1), which is 7.
Check the options: 21, 28, 35 are divisible by 7; 44 is not.
